expectations.evidence: Shows both 'hermai registry push /tmp/my-schema.json' and 'curl -X POST https://api.hermai.ai/v1/schemas' with -d @/tmp/my-schema.json.
Step 2 covers 'hermai registry login' and manual config.yaml setup with platform_key. API path shows Authorization: Bearer header.
CLI: 'hermai registry push /tmp/my-schema.json'. API: POST to https://api.hermai.ai/v1/schemas. Both correct.
